mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO GATHER.TB_SFLOW_COLLECT ( COLLECT_SEQ, COLLECT_HOST, AGENT_ADDRESS, ETHER_TYPE, HEADER_PROTOCOL, INPUT_IFINDEX, OUTPUT_IFINDEX, SAMPLE_DIRECTION, SRC_IP, SRC_MAC, SRC_PORT, SOURCE_ID_TYPE, SOURCE_ID_INDEX, DST_IP, DST_MAC, DST_PORT, PACKET_BYTES, PACKET_DROPS, FRAME_LENGTH, HEADER_LENGTH, IP_DSCP, IP_ECN, IP_FLAGS, IP_FRAGMENT_OFFSET, IP_TOTAL_LENGTH, IP_TTL, SAMPLING_RATE, TCP_HEADER_LENGTH, TCP_URGENT_POINTER, TCP_WINDOW_SIZE, COLLECT_TIMESTAMP ) VALUES
( nextval('gather.seq_sflow_collect'), #{item.collectHost}, #{item.agentAddress}, #{item.etherType}, #{item.headerProtocol}, #{item.inputIfindex}, #{item.outputIfindex}, #{item.sampleDirection}, #{item.srcIp}, #{item.srcMac}, #{item.srcPort}, #{item.sourceIdType}, #{item.sourceIdIndex}, #{item.dstIp}, #{item.dstMac}, #{item.dstPort}, #{item.packetBytes}, #{item.packetDrops}, #{item.frameLength}, #{item.headerLength}, #{item.ipDscp}, #{item.ipEcn}, #{item.ipFlags}, #{item.ipFragmentOffset}, #{item.ipTotalLength}, #{item.ipTtl}, #{item.samplingRate}, #{item.tcpHeaderLength}, #{item.tcpUrgentPointer}, #{item.tcpWindowSize}, #{item.collectTimestamp} )
